summary: KOLO CRM v2.0.0 - AI Features & Onboarding Verification Complete. All requested features verified working: AI Suggestions card with violet gradient visible in both light/dark modes, onboarding flow triggers for new users, AI APIs functional, theme toggle works, bottom navigation functional.

ai_suggestions_card_dark_mode: AI Suggestions block visible with data-testid='ai-suggestions-block'
Violet/purple gradient background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.25) to rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.2)
Shows '3 suggestions IA' with prospect names and reasons
ai_suggestions_card_light_mode: Violet/purple gradient background: rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.15) to rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.12)
onboarding_flow: Registration form works (1 month free · No credit card badge visible)
New user registration successful - creates trialing account
Step 2: 'Import your first prospects' screen displayed
ai_api_endpoints: AI suggestions show prospect names and task recommendations
theme_toggle: Toggle switches theme-dark to theme-light correctly
Sun/moon icons display based on current theme

critical_code_review_comments: AI Suggestions card styling is well-implemented with different gradient intensities for dark (0.25/0.2) vs light (0.15/0.12) modes
Onboarding flow properly checks didacticiel_completed flag to determine when to show
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test user for onboarding verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI features fully tested and working. AI Suggestions card has pronounced violet gradient backgrounds in both themes. Onboarding flow triggers correctly for new users and shows Welcome > Import Prospects > Task Creation > Theme Selection > Ready steps. Theme toggle in Settings works. Bottom navigation functional.
